text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh woooow! Sniffle... This is greeeaat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I arrive at the cafeteria, I hear a familiar voice
crying...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaagh... Waaaaah! It's so overwhelming!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awww, Trainer! I cagn! Isshaw! Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, if you're gonna talk, can you try using words?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Trainer. It's the same emotional
sniffles as usual.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We were reading the racewear coverage in this
magazine together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, she was deeply moved by the
interview.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course I was! When I thought about all
the emotions held in all those racers' outfits when
they compete...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I remembered the first time I put on my own
racewear, and... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I remember. You were super annoying back
then too.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, look, look, look! My racewear's here!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pipe down, we can see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I must say, it suits you well. It looks like it's
made just for you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I know! You can tell, right? It fits so well!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Taishin! Hey, hey! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Sure is red.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? Give me more than that, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But you're right! Isn't this red really pretty? ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Even after that, she'd bawl about her racewear every time it came up.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was just so super happy! That outfit was
made special for me, you know?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When I imagine wearing it to the races of my
dreams... It makes me... so...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... So emotional! And it makes me really, really wanna win!
choice_data_list: I'm sure your rivals feel the same way.
Let's turn that emotion into motivation!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yeah, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The racers in this magazine, and Hayahide and
Taishin too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's happy to be able to run well in their
racewear! It's not just me who feels empowered by
it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! I can't just stand here!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Where are you going, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: To train! ...AH! I forgot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't start training without my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You forgot your own trainer...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it wouldn't be Ticket otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Watch me real close today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Hey, yeah, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ALL RIIIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna train harder than EVEEERRR!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And then I'll get to the race of my dreams and
inspire EVERYONE!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Ticket, maybe keep your voice down a little.
Everyone is looking at us.

text_block_list.name: Bystander
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's loud... Is she performing?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, right, we're in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Um, sorry about the noise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Applause echoes through the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What? They're clapping? What did I do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you, thank you! I'm gonna do a great
job today!

text_block_list.name: Taishin and Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a show.
